video_info.title: Talent TV Cup
video_info.shortDescription: The Talent TV Cup kicks off with an exciting clash between India A and Sri Lanka A, setting the tone for the tri-series. Both sides bring a mix of promising youngsters and emerging match-winners, eager to make their mark on the big stage. Will Vaibhav Sooryavanshi steal the limelight and set the tone for the opening fixture? Find out as we bring you all the action from this Sri Lanka A vs India A fixture, LIVE on Sony LIV.
